title: Amino acids
summary: 9701 A Level amino acids — zwitterions, peptide bonds, and protein primary structure.
learningObjectives: Draw amino acid structures and zwitterions.
Relate R groups to protein properties.

simpleExplanation.title: Building blocks of proteins
simpleExplanation.summary: Amino acids exist as zwitterions in solution. Condensation forms peptide links in polypeptide chains.

sections.content: **Amino acids** (34.4) bridge **organic chemistry** and **biochemistry**. Know **20 R groups** classes for A Level.
